pkgmetadata.longdescription: ADMIXTOOLS implements D-statistics and related methods for testing admixture (Patterson et al. 2012). Key programs: qpAdm (admixture proportions), qpGraph (admixture graph fitting), qpWave, qp3Pop, qpDstat (D-statistics).

use.flag: Skip installing convertf and mergeit (provided by sci-biology/eigensoft).
